user.title: Webhook Notify
user.description: Configure a webhook URL to receive notifications via HTTP POST.

data.name: Service Name (ASCII only, optional — auto-set by preset)
data.payload_template: Custom Template (JSON + Jinja2, only for 'Custom' preset)

error.invalid_url: URL must start with http:// or https://
error.invalid_template: Template must render to valid JSON
error.invalid_name: Only English letters, numbers, and underscores allowed (HA slugifies Chinese to pinyin)
